game.title: Quacktum Entanglement
game.short_text: Mind-bending, time-warping, puzzle-heavy adventure!

details.title: Quacktum Entanglement
details.description:
Thanks to everyone for rating and congratulations to the winners! Given the very positive feedback and high interest in the game, I'm considering to completely remake Quacktum Entanglement's main ideas into a full game. You can read more info regarding that in my newest devlog. Make sure to follow me on itch to stay up to date with future games and announcements!
Welcome to the Quacktum enganglement, a mind-bending puzzle game about time travel! Plan your route and carefully lead your minions so that they can guide your character to safety. As brave as your chicken-like helpers are, there are obstacles they cannot overcome. Fortunately, the duck gods gave you an access to the ancient quantum tape recorder - a device which allows you to control the time and rewind the actions your minions took, while the environment still moves forward in time.
Good luck, 20 challenging levels await!

Code, design, music and most of the sfx done by me.
Art based on Paper Pixels asset pack - https://v3x3d.itch.io/paper-pixels
Playback clicking sound by https://freesound.org/people/JarredGibb/Consider playing the standalone version over the WebGL one.
Windows (at least 7)  and DirectX (at least 10) required.

game.short_text: Plan your mistakes, take advantage of past errors, and get through this journey of self-learning and improvement!

details.description:
To Grow is about using your mistakes to become better.
In this sidescroller, you play as a patient who is in a regression therapy session. In this session, you go through challenges of your past, and as you make mistakes, they rewind to a few seconds before you made it.
The catch is, while they are rewinding, you can use them to get to places you couldn't get before!
Plan your mistakes, take advantage of past errors, and get through this journey of self-learning and improvement!

game.title: The Case of the Deviant Detective
game.short_text: Ya Uncle Frankie needs a job done. Are you up for the challenge?

details.title: The Case of the Deviant Detective
details.description:
Thank you to everyone who rated this game. You are awesome! Thanks to your support and valuable feedback, we placed 3rd overall in the Brackeys Game Jam :)
--------------
Your goal in each level is to turn a prerecorded witness statement into a criminal confession. Rewind and record each witness' alibi in different ways to get them convicted of heinous crimes!
A (Hold) - Rewind, S - Play, D (Hold) - Fast Forward, W - Submit, Space (Hold) - Record
There is a lighting limitation in WebGL that causes minor glitches. If you can play the Executable version, please do!
Brackeys Game Jam 2020.2 Submission. Created by Mythos Interactive, a 4 person studio startup in just under 7 days. 

As a new detective on the force, you are just getting your first big cases. The Case of the Deviant Detective puts a new spin on the Noir mystery drama of the early 20th century. Follow the case work of Charlie, a new detective on the force, whose Uncle happens to be a part of the mafia, and needs you to do something for him. Join Charlie as he gets a call from Uncle Frank, calling in the favor of getting you on the force with his connections. 
Are you ready to REWIND the tapes, and set the fate of these suspects?
Did we mention the theme of the Jam was "Rewind"?Download your operating system's matching ZIP filePlace in a folder or on your desktopRight click > Extract HereDouble click on the EXE file

game.short_text: A platformer, puzzler where you can change the color of your cube to solve puzzles.

details.title: ReColor
details.description:
AboutReColor was made for Brackeys Game Jam 2020.2. ReColor is a platformer, puzzler where you can change the color of your cube to solve puzzles. The main mechanic is that you can Rewind through all of the colors you switched to in the current puzzle.Controls
ActionControlMove LeftLeft Arrow or AMove RightRight Arrow or DJumpSpacebarInteractFRewind ColorRReset PuzzleBackspacePauseEscape

Directors NotesI built this game mostly as a solo project in my free time after work throughout the week of the Game Jam. That said, I have credit that need/want to give:Josh Hovis: Music and Sound Effects (along with general second opinion throughout the process).Also a special thanks to my friends and coworkers who play test this game. I really couldn't have done it without all of their help.My biggest take away from this Jam is that I really want to keep working on level and puzzle design. Everything else I got setup pretty easily, but I just struggled with puzzle design until the very end. I feel like I kind of cracked the code for what makes a fun puzzle in this game, but then it was to late. I would have also liked to explore more thematic elements in my game, but that's just a lesson for next time.Thank you for anyone who has stopped by to play my game!

game.title: Sir Ewind
game.short_text: A game about using time manipulation and the environment to hunt down Paradox Creatures

details.title: Sir Ewind
details.description:
Meet Sir Ewind, a time travelling space wizard, assigned with the difficult task of eliminating all Paradox Creatures. The task itself is made that much more difficult due to the fact that he is not allowed the use of any weapons. His code of conduct prevents him from purchasing any firearms, such as: 9mm pistols, AK-47 rifles, double-barreled shotguns, long-scoped sniper rifles etc. His code also prevents him from using any blunt instruments, including his staff. That being said, he does have the power of space-time continuum at his fingertips, including the ability to both rewind and completely freeze time around him, which is a considerable advantage.
Buttons:
Movement - WASDJump - SpaceRestart - RInteract with Object - Left ClickFreeze Single Enemy(not available from the start) - Right ClickInteract with door - ERewind Time - QFreeze Time - F
Details - This is a game made for the 4th Brackeys Game Jam, theme being "Rewind". Total Dev Time - 1 Week
Font Used - m5x7 by Daniel Linssen
Sound samples: - soundbible.com- freesound.org
Edit:
There is an issue when pressing the left alt key. It was supposed to be the button for the original time freeze mechanic, but some code was left over by mistake, which causes the game to act a bit weird. Pressing alt again will fix the issue.

game.title: Rewind Time
game.short_text: Play as a scientist and rewind time to complete all of the puzzles!

details.title: Rewind Time
details.description:
This game was made in one week for the Brackeys Jam 2020.2, with a specific theme: REWIND. Thank you for playing!
Note: The game was made in one week, therefore, there may be bugs or issues. Updates and more levels are coming in the near future!

Description:
You are one of the scientists working on time travel, and one day, you finally achieve it! You can now successfully travel back in time and create "time clones" to help you! In this game, you test the time-travel mechanism by solving different puzzles to make your way through the levels. So buckle up and put your time-travelling pants on, because it's rewind time!

Controls:
Move right - "D" or Right Arrow KeyMove left - "A" or Left Arrow KeyFly up (using jetpack) - "W" or Spacebar or Up Arrow KeyRewind time (go back in time) - "R"Restart a level - "M" or menu option on the top right corner of the level
NOTES:
To rewind time (using "R"), you have to activate one time-recorder pressure plate.Rewinding time only affects the player, not the environment!Jetpack refills fuel only when you stand on the ground.Restart levels quickly using shortcut "M" if you get stuck.

This game was extremely fun to make, and I hope you have just as much fun playing it! Linux supported build: https://crexcrex.itch.io/rewind-time-linux-build

game.title: Second Chance
game.short_text: Shoot down all the enemies and rewind to the past to save yourself before you die!

details.title: Second Chance
details.description:
Shoot down all the enemies and rewind to the past to save yourself before you die!


NOTE: Press the button under 'Difficulty' to change difficulty.
Controls
WASD to moveMouse to aimClick to shoot
How to play
Dodge all the enemies and shoot them to kill them!If you get hit, time will rewind, giving you a chance to save your past self:Pay attention to which enemy killed you, and when you go to the past, kill them before they fire the fatal shot!If you fail to save yourself, it's game over.After a rewind, there is a short cooldown before you can rewind again - if you die before this cooldown is over, you lose.Shoot enemies in quick succession to score higher and higher combos for massive high scores!There are 3 types of enemies:Triangles will constantly shoot at you, sometimes getting enraged and burst firing a few predictive shots!Spikes stay still and kill you if you hit them. Watch out though - they spawn where they think you're going, to try and trip you up!Squares move quite slowly towards you, but shoot them and they split into two much faster mini-squares!Play at one of 5 difficulty levels: Easy, Normal, Hard, Insane and Impossible.Playing at harder difficulties is obviously more challenging, but it does make getting high scores a lot easier because you can reach higher combos!There is also a Tutorial that you should play first, to get used to the rewind mechanics.How long will you last? Feel free to comment your best times and scores below!
Tools used
p5.js with p5ui.jsBosca Ceoilsfxr
Created by Saksham Shah for the Brackeys Game Jam 2020.2

game.title: SUSHI unROLL
game.short_text: Unroll the Sushi and make money! An arcade style click and drag game.

details.title: SUSHI unROLL
details.description:
There's always some sushi that no one would eat in the restaurant. What if you can.. rewind the sushi and turn them into something else? 
SUSHI unROLL is an arcade-style click-and-drag game. You are a professional sushi unroller. Yes, your job is to unroll the sushi and return them to the ingredients for reuse.  Every time you take sushi from the conveyor belt, you lose some money, but don't worry, if you can fill the ingredient box on the left and make those poor sushis worth their lives, you will earn more!

[ TUTORIAL ]
Use the mouse as your hand!

Drag the plate onto the cutting board to unroll. Nigiri sushi is easy to disassemble. If you got a maki roll, drag up to unroll them, then take the ingredient away to uncover the rice. Use the spoon to scrape the rice and roll up the seaweed at the bottom.

Each box only appears for a limited time. The button on the side shows what ingredient it needs. You can press the button to send out boxes when you're done. You only get paid if you filled up a box by the request number! If you can fill multiple boxes and send them out at the same time, you will get a bonus

Ticky, a digital clock got stuck in the caves and he has to find a way out. Luckily, he has a rewind skill that can help him escape!

Goal
There are 5 levels in order for Ticky to escape.Collect the key to open the gate.Go to the gate and proceed to the next level.

Controls
A & D/ Arrow Left & Right - Move
Space - Jump
E - Rewind Skill
Details for the skill: As Ticky activates the skill, he will start his timer of 3 seconds and leave a clone of himself. Within that time, he can move anywhere he wants before he rewound back to where his clone was and reunite.

Thoughts

Are you ready for some action? Drop in the wild western saloon and show everyone that you are the best shooter out there.

game.title: Faux
game.short_text: While jumping, time rewinds around you.

details.title: Faux
details.description:
Faux Update#01Hey folks! I am Jakasaurus, one of the devs of Faux. 7th place in the Brackeys game jam is a huge achievement for us! We apppreciate all the feedback from the game jam and we are here to talk about the future of Faux. 
Since the jam, we've worked on an update to fix some of the jank in the game. Platforming and physics feel more smooth and consistent. All code has been de-janked as well. Because of the speedrunning with the coding, a lot of our original code was not super organized.
We've started idea crafting for a new area which would be in between Limbo and the Cottonwood Forest (Area 1 and 2 in the jam build) with new mechanics. We also have started working on a save-state mechanic to keep track of where you are in the game so you can finish at another time. A start screen and pause menu with settings and credits are in the works. We will keep everyone updated on our progress on these tasks.
Anyway, thanks again for checking out our game or rating it during the jam. There is definitely a future with this game and we are excited to explore it with you guys! 
A mysterious and mute protagonist journeys across different dimensions existing in past, present and future, observing the complexities of what once was. With the aid of peculiar time-reversing abilities, traverse three temporally-trapped zones while platforming through space and preventing time from collapsing on itself. 
While jumping, time rewinds around you. Raindrops float upwards and moving platforms return to their start. Keep the timeline stable by ensuring time never moves too far forward or backwards. 
We had a lot of fun with this "Rewind" themed game jam, especially for our first game jam and first time using Monogame and Microsoft's XNA framework. This is a work-in-progress. The first zone, Limbo, was our proof of concept and the following areas are our ideas for what could be mechanics in a more completed game. Be on the lookout for secrets in the levels and game! We look forward to what you guys think of our concept!
NOTE: If the game requires you to download .NET, please download ASP.NET Core Runtime 3.1.6 available here.
Controls:
Move - a/d or directional arrows or thumbstick on a controller
Jump - space/z or a on a controller
Reset - r
Original Soundtrack:
Soundcloud
Bandcamp
Although we could not finish the whole game, the soundtrack is available on Soundcloud and Bandcamp for your listening pleasure. Some bits never made it into the game (latter half of "Eternal Terrarium") - check it out when you can!

game.title: Chrono Guy and the Fabled Time Cup
game.short_text: Classic Puzzle-Platformer meets Time Rewind

details.title: Chrono Guy and the Fabled Time Cup
details.description:
Chrono Guy and the Fabled Time Cup is a curious puzzle-platformer that has you running, jumping and time warping typically-impossible dungeons, had you been a typically-normal person. 
Take control of Chrono Guy, young wizard practicing the hidden arts of Time Magic, and make your way through the Temple of Yesterday, with your powers to reverse time. 
ANY objects that have moved, can be rewind - including yourself.
REWIND

Missed your step? Turn back time. Gate just closed? Turn back time. Impending death from oncoming boulder? Turn back time.
Putting the retry in a literal manner, you can rewind objects to their previous positions and exploit the timeline to your favour. Be mindful though - as an aspiring time wizard, you can only exert your influence one object at a time, and only for so long. 
Rethink, retry, rewind.

CONTROLS 
Classic platformer meets time travel - There is a tutorial in-game that better introduces the mechanics - these are here for convenience.
<A, D> for movement.<Spacebar> to jump.<Mouse and Left Mouse Button> to select and REWIND objects.<R> to restart anytime - useful if you're stuck, or bugs, or just quick REWIND.
This game is submitted for the Brackeys Game Jam with the theme : REWIND. This has been a blast - and for those that have enjoyed my game, thanks for playing!

game.title: Tiny Kingdom
game.short_text: Tiny room tower defense game

details.title: Tiny Kingdom
details.description:
Tiny Kingdom is a cute tower defense game of currently 3 levels. It was created within 1 week for the Brackeys Jam 2020.2. In the beginning we thought, come on, how hard can it be to build a tower defense game... uhm 1 week later... we thank whoever brought us to this final version in time. It was insane... but fun.
Diorama Tower Defense: Tiny Kingdom👑 Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/WJgwkRr
Download the updated, all new Prologue version on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1574720/Diorama_Tower_Defense_Tiny_Kingdom_Pr...
What is special compared with other tower defense games? You can rewind time to send back enemies for some seconds in time, the isometric tiny room style is unique, you can grab a tower from the playfield and place it somewhere else and we included evil rainbow unicorns!! Take that...
Definition of a tower defense game, taken from Wikipedia
Tower defense or TD is a subgenre of strategy video games where the goal is to defend a player's territories or possessions by obstructing the enemy attackers, usually achieved by placing defensive structures on or along their path of attack. This typically means building a variety of different structures that serve to automatically block, impede, attack or destroy enemies. Tower defense is seen as a subgenre of real-time strategy video games, due to its real-time origins, though many modern tower defense games include aspects of turn-based strategy. Strategic choice and positioning of defensive elements is an essential strategy of the genre.
Thank you Wikipedia.
So, how to play this game... the only tool you need is your mouse and some strategy. When inside a level you will get some coins for free to build your first defense system or tower, you can choose from the cheap archers tower, or the canon tower who shoots mines on the playfield, which of course are detonating with enemies near by, to the magicians or ice tower who can slow down enemies. Find out which tower is most effective against the enemies.
With your left mouse button you grab a tower from the right sidebar, in case you have got enough coins available, you get more coins by removing enemies from the playfield, no they are not killed, they are now in a safe place... for sure. Move your mouse cursor over the playfield and release the tower by releasing your left mouse button, if you found the right spot, the tower will snap into an available spot. To place this tower somewhere else, just click and grab it again and move it somewhere else. If you like to remove the tower from the playfield, click, grab and move it over the trashcan in the lower left corner of the screen, by the way, you get some coins back, how great it that...
To call in the next wave, in the right lower corner click on the play button, when one wave entered the playfield you can call in the next wave. But we sure and prepared that your defense system is build up perfectly.
If you built up a good defense system, you can fast forward a wave by clicking on the fast forward button. Wait, what for is the rewind button over there... as the topic of the Brackeys Jam 2020.2 is REVERSE, send back the enemies where they came from, but you only can do that three times per level.
The game is over when you lost your life, how sad is that by the way... do not let that happen! Enjoy the game and look out for more soon. Good luck!

“Rewind the wind to manipulate the sail race, to ensure that order is kept.”

details.title: Turnip Castle
details.description:
Description
In a world where vegetables rule, a little turnip tries to find back his grandpa lost in the castle of their ancestors.
This game was made during the Brackeys Jam 2020.2.The player is able to "rewind" time to play as the grandfather  in order to help the young turnip. As the two characters do not evolve at the same time, the configuration of the rooms changes and the grandfather must therefore modify his environment to facilitate the passage to his grandson. The grandfather also benefits from a wall jump.
Controls
if you play with a keyboard
   => arrow keys to walk and jump
   => r to  switch  between grandfather and grandson
   => e to  complete a level
if you play with a controller (recommended)
   => joystick to walk and a to  jump
   => y to  switch  between grandfather and grandson
   => x  to  complete a level

game.title: Kaset
game.short_text: Rewind back to the 80's in this synthwave inspired arcade space shooter.

details.title: Kaset
details.description:
***Update***Post Jam Version is Live!!
New Additions + Changes:
Added 5th level with new weapon + music!Added new Enemy!Added a full tutorial!Added Audio Settings in the game menuAdded Escape Key as secondary way to pause gameAdded a pause menu closing animationBalanced Rewind ability by adding short cooldown periodLess downtime in all levels (Adjusting difficulty stars accordingly)Level completed menu appearing much earlier after song has endedBuffing cube enemies by making their projectiles go through other enemies And some more stuff I might have forgotten
About: 
Kaset is an Arcade Space Shooter inspired by 80's arcade graphics and the synthwave music genre. This game was made for the Brackeys 2020.2 Game Jam. The theme was Rewind.
Controls:
Arrow Keys -OR- WASD to move.
Mouse to Aim.
Click to Shoot.
Spacebar to Rewind!!
Gameplay:
 You control a set of old cassette tapes, playing through the music they contain, while fighting neon, three dimensional shapes. As a cassette you are tethered to a long stretch of tape. While this tape can restrict your movement, you also have the powerful ability to rewind the tape, gaining back some tape for movement while also destroying enemies in your way. Geometric enemies will spawn on the outskirts of the screen in tune with the music to challenge you. Luckily each cassette comes equipped with a unique weapon perfect for the job. The goal is to acquire as many points as possible in the given levels by chaining kill combos and finishing with as much health left as possible.

I created the entirety of Kaset excluding what is included in the Attributions below. Generally any of the music, sound effects and fonts were not made by me.
